case_title: CHAD MCWHORTER ET AL VS. ART TORRES ET AL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY MCWHORTER, CHAD MCWHORTER, EMILEE ESCUDERO, GONZALO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,627.43 FILED BY MCWHORTER, CHAD MCWHORTER, EMILEE AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ART ESCUDERO, GONZALO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED JAN-23-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ART
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JAN-23-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESCUDERO, GONZALO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TORRES, ART

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ART TORRES WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. DEFENDANT ART TORRES WAS REPRESENTED BY GONZALO ESCUDERO. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCWHORTER, CHAD MCWHORTER, EMILEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, ART ESCUDERO, GONZALO $3,425.82 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,625.82, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY FOR PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
